title: Evaluation of changes in dietary methodology in NDNS: stage 3
body: "This is the third and final report on the evaluation of the change in dietary assessment methodology in the NDNS, from a paper diary to an online recall. This change was implemented from 2019.  NDNS is jointly funded by the Department of Health and Social Care and the Food Standards Agency. This evaluation was carried out by a consortium of the National Centre for Social Research and the Medical Research Council Epidemiology Unit, University of Cambridge.  "
